page_metadata.biotools__summary: EBOLApred is a machine learning-based web application for predicting molecules capable of inhibiting the activities of glycoprotein (GP) and the matrix protein (VP40) of the Ebola virus.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: EBOLApred is a machine learning-based web application for predicting molecules capable of inhibiting the activities of glycoprotein (GP) and the matrix protein (VP40) of the Ebola virus.
